name: Avatar
description: Generate AI avatars tailored to your brand's audience. Choose a style, get a character brief from Gemini, and generate a full reference sheet with body + face angles.

name: UGC Creator
description: Create complete UGC videos: script, base image, multishot variations, voice, lip-sync, subtitles.

name: Product Clip
description: Short product video (10-15s). No people — just the product, beautifully shot and animated. Perfect for Stories, e-commerce, product reveals.

name: Content Analyzer
description: Analyze any video (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram) and extract: script, scene prompts, visual style. Then recreate similar content with your brand.

name: Video Ad Creator
description: Create cinematic video ads: storyboard, 10 keyframes, frame-to-frame animation with Kling, voiceover, music, and final render.

name: Static Ad
description: Create ready-to-publish static ads with product, copy, logo, and brand colors. Perfect for social media, display, and print.

name: Carousel Creator
description: Create multi-slide carousel ads for Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn. Cohesive visual story with consistent style across all slides.

name: Ad Creative Lab
description: Generate brand-consistent ad creatives from reference images. Upload references, analyze visual style, generate multiple variations, iterate.

name: Product Spotlight
description: Professional product photography in context. Place your product in any setting with studio-quality lighting and composition.

name: Fashion Reel
description: Visual fashion/lifestyle reels — no talking, pure movement. Story mode (Hook → Movement → Showcase → Closer) or Looks mode (one scene per outfit).

name: Ecommerce Pack
description: Ficha de producto e-commerce: una prenda sobre modelo en estudio + vistas de la prenda (frente, espalda, detalle), todas consistentes. Elegís qué tomas generar.

name: Video Swap
description: Swap a garment, product or background in YOUR own video while keeping the subject and motion. Powered by Beeble SwitchX — composites over the real footage and relights to match.

name: Reel Creator
description: Create short-form video reels with scenes, music, and subtitles.

name: Background Remover
description: Remove background from product photos using AI segmentation.
